race.comment: TENNESSEE SPIRIT (13) looks very well placed second up off a strong return at Caulfield Heath, on speed there and only going down a long neck. She's yet to miss the money in four starts and finds the ideal race to be breaking through here. DEADLY FORCE (2) is a gelding by Exceed And Excel on debut for the Freedman yard who have a strong hand on today's card. Williams rode him to win a recent trial and sticks today which is promising, albeit the draw isn't ideal. REGAL VANGUARD (7) showed improvement at his second outing and has each way claims with further progression. MORDU (5) is a Nicconi gelding for the Corboy yard who can run well.
